### Insight 1: jq hooks dependency

jq must be installed before hooks can parse stdin — hooks fail-OPEN silently if jq is absent. Discovered this when userpromptsubmit.sh produced no output after a fresh clone on a CI box without jq. Install via `brew install jq` or `apt-get install jq` before running `bash install.sh`.

**Promote?:** yes
**Applies to:** /implement, /init_workflow

### Insight 2: install.sh idempotency guard

The install.sh conditional write pattern (`[ -f marker ] || echo ... > marker`) ensures that re-running install.sh after initial deploy does NOT reset the dry-run clock. Always use this pattern for first-deploy-only writes.

**Promote?:** maybe
**Applies to:** /implement
